description_long: This structure is a large, curved dam made primarily of light-colored wood, featuring a smooth, continuous surface that forms a half-pipe shape. The dam has vertical end walls and a gently arched central section, with sturdy wooden railings running along the top edges for safety. The railings are supported by evenly spaced vertical posts, providing a clear boundary along the upper walkways. The surface of the dam is uniform in color and texture, with visible wood grain patterns throughout. There are no visible water channels, spillways, or control gates integrated into the design. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, with no signage or decorative elements present.
description: A large, light wood dam with a smooth, curved half-pipe shape and wooden railings along the top edges. The structure is minimalistic, with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face of the dam, the curved central section, and the wooden railings along the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full half-pipe curvature, both end platforms, and the continuous wooden railings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the vertical wall, curved surface, and railings clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the full curved profile and both end platforms with railings.
